UltraGrid 1.9.12 (tags/v1.9.12 rev 669a27d built Oct 21 2025 08:09:11)

Core Audio capture usage:
	-s coreaudio[:<index>|:<name>]
where
	<name> - device name substring (case sensitive)

Available Core Audio capture devices:
	coreaudio    : Default CoreAudio capture
	coreaudio:158: NDI Audio
	coreaudio:100: BlackHole 16ch
	coreaudio:116: BlackHole 2ch
	coreaudio:132: BlackHole 64ch
	coreaudio:95 : MacBook Pro Microphone
	coreaudio:148: Microsoft Teams Audio
	coreaudio:175: ZoomAudioDevice
	coreaudio:61 : Hauptgeraet
Exit
